name: Vampire Sucker
name_jp: ヴァンパイア・サッカー
desc:
2 Zombie monsters
If you would Tribute a monster(s) for a Tribute Summon, you can Tribute a Zombie monster(s) your opponent controls, even though you do not control them. You can only use each of the following effects of "Vampire Sucker" once per turn. You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your opponent's field in Defense Position, but it becomes a Zombie monster. If a Zombie monster(s) is Special Summoned from either GY: Draw 1 card.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
